arts.ttl: Carlisle United boss responds to striker rumour
arts.sum: Head coach Mark Hughes today scotched rumours linking Carlisle United with free agent striker Connor Wickham.

arts.ttl: Hughes reveals 'serious' extent of Carlisle United defender's injury
arts.sum: Mark Hughes has cast doubt on whether Josh Williams will play again this season – but Callum Guy and Archie Davies are back in contention.

Carlisle's 0-0 draw with Colchester at the weekend ended four straight defeats but chances of survival are minimal. Gillingham's 0-0 draw with Crewe at the weekend made it two games without defeat an...
